properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Come let us worship our King Come let us bow at His feet He has done great things See what our Savior has done See how His love overcomes He has done great things He has done great things

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, hero of Heaven, You conquer the grave You free every captive and break every chain Oh God, You have done great things We dance in Your freedom, awake and alive Oh Jesus, our Savior, Your name lifted high Oh God, You have done great things

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You've been faithful through every storm You'll be faithful forevermore You have done great things And I know You will do it again For Your promise is "Yes and amen" You will do great things God, You do great things

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Hallelujah God, above it all Hallelujah God, unshakable Hallelujah, You have done great things Hallelujah God, above it all Hallelujah God, unshakable Hallelujah, You have done great things You've done great things

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You have done great things Oh God, You do great things
